calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiff'S Request For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:47 am and concluding at 10:44 am.

Plaintiff Mission Gas Corp is present represented by Jill Cohoe, Esq. via zoom video conference.
Defendant Miguel Delgado is not present.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

WISFE AISH is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Grant Deed
Exhibit 2: Quickclaim Deed

The matter is submitted.
By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Mission Gas Corp, and against Defendant Miguel Delgado, as follows:

1. Plaintiff is the sole owner in fee simple of that certain real property commonly
known as 3400 Mission Street, San Francisco, California 94110, APN Lot 60,
Block 6660 and legally described in Exhibit A attached hereto and incorporated
herein by reference (the "Property");

2. Title to the Property is hereby quieted as of November 30, 2023 in favor of Plaintiff and
against all claims of Defendants.

Proposed judgment signed and filed.(D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Continued To Sep-04-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2024 Continued To Jul-03-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
